name: cheaplive
description: > 一个面向移动端个人主播的零成本虚拟主播直播辅助工具。 > 无需电脑，纯浏览器端运行，让任何有手机的普通人都能成为虚拟主播。

scripts.test:all: node --test tests/unit/*.test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e
scripts.test:webrtc: npx playwright test tests/e2e/webrtc-connected.test.js tests/e2e/audio-track.test.js tests/e2e/multi-device.test.js
scripts.test:visual: npx playwright test tests/e2e/mesh-visual.test.js tests/e2e/before-screenshots.test.js tests/e2e/after-screenshots.test.js tests/e2e/procedural-demo.test.js
scripts.test:functional: npx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.test.js tests/e2e/copy-clipboard.test.js tests/e2e/voice-changer.test.js tests/e2e/voice-changer-ui.test.js tests/e2e/audio-track.test.js tests/e2e/multi-device.test.js tests/e2e/webrtc-connected.test.js
